title: Prefer nanoMDBG for short long-read assemblies
summary: Median read length below 1000 bp favors nanoMDBG over metaFlye for the initial metagenomic assembly heuristic.
warning: This is an expert heuristic override inside the selected backend, not a backend reroute.

title: Single-isolate ligation framing
summary: LSK114 usually implies a single-sample isolate route where demultiplexing is not the main early concern.
warning: Treat the route as single-sample by default unless the wet-lab setup explicitly introduced pooling or barcoding.

title: Per-barcode isolate handling
summary: This route assumes one isolate per barcode and comparative downstream interpretation across barcodes.
warning: Keep barcode naming and per-isolate separation consistent before comparative assembly, AMR, and plasmid steps.

title: Matched control available
summary: Interpret the adaptive-sampling run alongside the matched control to evaluate target recovery and downstream differences.
warning: Keep the adaptive-sampling and control outputs paired through the result interpretation workflow.

title: Low-biomass environmental caution
summary: Low biomass can reduce assembly and binning confidence, so taxonomic and functional outputs should be interpreted conservatively.
warning: Assembly and MAG recovery may be less stable in sparse environmental material.

title: Assembly-centered interpretation
summary: The result should emphasize assembly, polishing, and genome recovery outputs over quick taxonomic screening alone.
warning: Prefer basecalling and filtering choices that preserve downstream assembly quality.

title: Low viral load expected
summary: Sparse viral signal should be interpreted conservatively and may reduce assembly yield.
warning: Retain sensitivity-aware downstream interpretation and expect weaker contig recovery.

title: Contigs already available
summary: The action sheet should emphasize classification, polishing, and annotation rather than starting from raw assembly again.
warning: Confirm that the existing contigs are compatible with the selected backend expectations.

title: Barcoded amplicon pool
summary: Amplicon pools usually require barcode-aware separation and primer-aware cleanup before taxonomic interpretation.
warning: Keep barcode-aware amplicon handling visible if the pool has not yet been separated.

title: Short-read support available
summary: Short-read support data are available and should be kept visible as an auxiliary validation route.
warning: Keep short-read support separate from the main ONT action sheet unless the branch explicitly documents cross-platform integration.

title: Hybrid assembly support available
summary: Short-read data are available, so hybrid assembly remains a viable refinement path inside the selected single-isolate backend.
warning: Keep long-read and short-read assets paired if you intend to use hybrid assembly or polishing.

title: Closed genome is the priority
summary: The action sheet should emphasize finishing, circularization, and assembly quality rather than only screening-oriented outputs.
warning: Favor accuracy-preserving preprocessing and downstream assembly quality checks.

title: Per-barcode isolate outputs still need separation
summary: Comparative isolate workflows assume one cleaned dataset per barcode before assembly and relatedness analysis.
warning: Finish barcode-aware separation before comparative isolate analysis.

title: Comparative phylogeny is a priority
summary: Keep barcode naming, isolate metadata, and downstream comparative outputs aligned for outbreak-style interpretation.
warning: Preserve consistent isolate identifiers through assembly and comparative analysis.

title: Host association is the primary deliverable
summary: Keep linkage outputs and host-association interpretation central in the result summary.
warning: Do not collapse the route into generic metagenome screening if host linkage is the main output.

title: Target reads already look enriched
summary: The result should emphasize downstream recovery and interpretation rather than enrichment troubleshooting.
warning: Confirm whether the adaptive-sampling objective has already been met before over-tuning upstream steps.
